case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. LORNA D QUIAMBAO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
NOTIC OF MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. LAST DAY FOR SERVICE BY MAIL FOR ORIGINAL HEARING DATE OF 3/9/11 WAS 2/9/11 PER C C P 12C AND CCP 1005 (B), THUS SERVICE BY MAIL ON 2/11/11 WAS NOT TIMELY AND COURT'S CONTINUANCE TO 3/16/11 FOR COURTESY COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS DOES NOT CURE THIS DEFECT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-10-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-15-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 16, 2011 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B) NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-16-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR NOV-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
